findings.title: Band profile read and model-prompt-strategies read could overlap
findings.detail: Step 1 reads the band profile from docs/band-profiles/{name}.yaml, and Step 2 reads references/model-prompt-strategies.md. These are currently sequential across steps. However, model selection often depends on the profile's model_preference field (line 65), creating a soft dependency. The savings would be minimal (one file read latency, ~1-2 seconds) and only applies when the user provides the model upfront.
findings.action: Consider loading model-prompt-strategies.md eagerly in Step 1 alongside the band profile read when the model is already known. When model depends on profile, the current sequential order is correct.

findings.title: Reference track web search and model strategy load could be batched
findings.detail: In Step 2, the skill loads model-prompt-strategies.md (line 84) and may perform web searches for reference track decomposition (line 100). These are independent operations when both are needed. Batching saves one round-trip (~2-3 seconds). Only applies when the user provides reference tracks.
findings.action: When reference tracks are provided in Step 1, batch the web search for artist/song decomposition with the model-prompt-strategies.md read in a single tool-call message at the start of Step 2.
